title: Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam
tagline: Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Thandayuthapani Temples are Hindu temples based in the village of Chettikulum (Perambalur district) in Perambalur district.
overview.description: The Thandayuthapani Temples are Hindu temples based in the village of Chettikulum (Perambalur district) in Perambalur district. The temples are dedicated to the Tamil god Dhandayuthapani and located 22 kilometres from Perambalur town on NH-45. The temples are believed to have been constructed by the Pandya king Kulasekhara.

topPlaces.name: Ekambareswarar Temple, Chettikulam
topPlaces.description: The Ekambareswarar Temple is a Hindu temple in the village of Chettikulam in Perambalur District, Tamil Nadu, in southern India. The temple is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Alathur taluk, Perambalur
topPlaces.description: Alathur taluk is a taluk in Perambalur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It was created by former chief minister J.Jayalalithaa for issues of population increase.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (42 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (39 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam?
faq.a: Stays in Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thandayuthapani Temples, Chettikulam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ekambareswarar Temple, Chettikulam, Alathur taluk, Perambalur, Alathur, Perambalur, Siruvachur.
